sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33949" key="e)/mbaqra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμβαθρα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n33949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.93</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
